title: Verify structured BUDGET invocation
preconditions: Valid, malformed, forbidden-field, expected-failure, interrupted-delivery, and metadata-canary invocations are available with stdout, stderr, exit, log, process, and temporary-artifact capture.
steps: Invoke the relevant Public Budget Operations and exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-STRUCTURED-INVOCATION, including its validation, lifecycle, compatibility, authority, replay, and unavailable paths where applicable.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-STRUCTURED-INVOCATION holds; all documented errors are stable; every rejected or failed mutation leaves the required prior state unchanged; no prohibited side effect occurs.
